change_summary: Implemented the planned `MLF.Constraint.Presolution.Core` facade removal entirely in the detached worktree `/Users/ares/.config/superpowers/worktrees/mlf4/round-1-scratch`. `src/MLF/Constraint/Presolution.hs` now imports the owner modules directly (`Driver`, `EdgeProcessing`, `Copy`, `Expansion`, `EdgeUnify`, `Unify`) while keeping the public export list unchanged; `src/MLF/Constraint/Presolution/Core.hs` was deleted; `mlf2.cabal` no longer lists that module; and the extracted presolution submodule headers were refreshed so they no longer describe a live `Core` facade. `implementation_notes.md` and `CHANGELOG.md` were updated, `TODO.md` was left unchanged because priorities did not materially change, and lightweight sanity passed with `cabal build mlf2-internal`, preserving thesis-exact behavior.
